## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change that preserves behavior
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] ci — CI / build changes
- [ ] chore — routine maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the existing code style and module layout
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)

- [ ] Self-reviewed the full diff before requesting merge
